tests.name: stats_then_streamstats
tests.description: Using stats followed by streamstats on aggregated results
tests.spl: index=web | stats count BY host | streamstats sum(count) as running_total BY host

tests.name: join_basic
tests.spl: index=web | join user [search index=hr | table user, department]

tests.name: transaction_with_patterns
tests.spl: index=web | transaction session_id startswith="login" endswith="logout" maxspan=1h

tests.name: eventstats_enrichment
tests.description: Using eventstats to enrich events with aggregations
tests.spl: index=web | eventstats avg(duration) as avg_duration BY host | where duration > avg_duration * 2

tests.name: multiple_evals
tests.spl: index=web | eval size_kb = bytes / 1024 | eval size_mb = size_kb / 1024 | table host, size_mb
